name: yukari-rubi
description: Add furigana reading aids to Japanese text on web pages
author: f3liz-dev

scripts.dev: npm run build && npx web-ext run --config web-ext.config.mjs
scripts.dev:chrome: npm run build:chrome && npx web-ext run --source-dir dist-chrome --target chromium
scripts.package: npm run fetch-dict && npm run build && npx web-ext build --config web-ext.config.mjs
scripts.package:chrome: npm run fetch-dict && npm run build:chrome && npx web-ext build --source-dir dist-chrome --artifacts-dir artifacts
